data.content:
Carlos Hernandez
Carlos Hernandez signed as the buyer on March 15, 2026, in the real estate transaction.<SEP>Carlos Hernandez is a buyer participating in a residential real estate transaction in Kentucky.

Robert Patterson
Robert Patterson signed as the seller on March 16, 2026, in the real estate transaction.<SEP>Robert Patterson is a seller involved in a residential real estate transaction in Kentucky.

Maria Hernandez
Maria Hernandez also signed as the buyer on March 15, 2026, in the real estate transaction.<SEP>Maria Hernandez is a buyer participating in a residential real estate transaction in Kentucky.

Linda Patterson
Linda Patterson signed as the seller on March 16, 2026, in the real estate transaction.<SEP>Linda Patterson is a seller involved in a residential real estate transaction in Kentucky.

Sarah Mitchell
Sarah Mitchell is the buyer's agent, representing Carlos and Maria Hernandez in the transaction.

James Okafor
James Okafor is the seller's agent, representing Robert and Linda Patterson in the transaction.

ZHomes TC Platform
ZHomes TC Platform is the entity managing transaction coordination, involved in the closing fees paid by the seller.<SEP>ZHomes TC Platform serves as the transaction coordinator for the real estate transaction.

Premier Real Estate Group
Premier Real Estate Group is the brokerage for the buyer's agent, Sarah Mitchell.

Kentucky
Kentucky is the state where the residential real estate transaction takes place.

First National Bank of Louisville
First National Bank of Louisville is the lender offering financing for the buyer.

Bluegrass Title & Escrow
Bluegrass Title & Escrow is the title company handling the closing of the real estate transaction.

Bluegrass Premier Realty
Bluegrass Premier Realty is the brokerage for the seller's agent, James Okafor.

David Nguyen
David Nguyen is the closing attorney associated with Bluegrass Title & Escrow.

1204 Sycamore Lane
1204 Sycamore Lane is the property address involved in the residential real estate transaction.

Patricia Chen
Patricia Chen is the loan officer at First National Bank of Louisville involved in the financing process.

Louisville
Louisville is the city in Kentucky where the residential property is located.

April 30, 2026
April 30, 2026 is the scheduled closing date for the residential real estate transaction.

Inspection Contingencies
Inspection contingencies refer to the conditions regarding home inspections required before the sale is finalized, including deadlines for various inspections.

Home Inspection Deadline
The home inspection deadline is set for March 25, 2026, by which the buyer must conduct a general home inspection.

Radon Inspection Deadline
The radon inspection deadline is established for March 25, 2026.

Termite/WDO Inspection Deadline
The termite/WDO inspection deadline is set for March 28, 2026.

Repair Allowance
Repair allowance refers to the agreement that the seller will credit the buyer up to $5,000 for repairs identified in the home inspection.

Inspection Response Deadline
The inspection response deadline is specified for March 28, 2026, during which the seller must respond to the buyer's repair requests.

Water Intrusion
Water intrusion refers to the minor water seepage in the basement experienced during the 100-year flood event in 2019, resulting in the installation of a French drain system.

Basement
The basement experienced minor water seepage, which prompted remedial measures like installing a French drain system.

FEMA Flood Zone X
FEMA Flood Zone X indicates a minimal flood hazard, confirming that the property is not in a known flood zone.

Commonwealth of Kentucky
The Commonwealth of Kentucky is referenced as the governing legal jurisdiction for the agreement.

Critical Deadlines Checklist
A checklist of important deadlines related to the real estate transaction activities leading up to closing.

Appraisal Contingency
The appraisal contingency allows the buyer to renegotiate or cancel if the property does not appraise above $385,000.

Utilities
The seller is obligated to maintain all utilities through the closing date, ensuring property functionality.

Total Commission
Total commission refers to the 5% of the purchase price amounting to $19,250.00 in the real estate transaction.

TC Fee
The TC fee is a charge of $500.00, paid by the seller to ZHomes TC Platform at closing.

Seller's Agent Commission
Seller's agent commission is 2.5% of the purchase price, amounting to $9,625.00, paid by the seller at closing.

Estimated Closing Costs (Buyer)
Estimated closing costs for the buyer approximate $7,405, encompassing various fees outlined in the document.

Estimated Closing Costs (Seller)
Estimated closing costs for the seller include $19,250 in real estate commissions and various other fees, totaling about $153,050 in proceeds.

Home Sale Contingency
Home sale contingency is stated as none since buyers have pre-qualified without needing to sell their current property.

Buyer's Agent Commission
Buyer's agent commission is 2.5% of the purchase price, amounting to $9,625.00, paid by the seller at closing.
